zh.lifeSummary: 當Salome von Are-Hochstaden於1155年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 韋塞爾坎-林特福特維其可拉斯時，她的父親Otto von Are34歲，母親Adelheid Von Hochstaden29歲。她和Graf Moritz I von Oldenburg至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1211年在歐登伯格享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Salome von Are-Hochstaden于1155年出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 韋塞爾坎-林特福特維其可拉斯时，她的父亲Otto von Are34岁，母亲Adelheid Von Hochstaden29岁。她和Graf Moritz I von Oldenburg至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1211年在歐登伯格享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Salome
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of an unrecorded Aramaic name, akin to the Hebrew word shalom ‘peace’. It was common at the time of Christ, and was borne by one of the women who were at his tomb and witnessed the Resurrection (Mark 16:1–8). This would normally have led to its common use as a Christian name, and it is indeed found as such in medieval times. However, according to the Jewish historian Josephus, it was also the name of King Herod's stepdaughter, the daughter of Queen Herodias. In the Bible, a daughter of Herodias, generally identified as this Salome, danced for Herod and so pleased him that he offered to give her anything she wanted. Prompted by her mother, she asked for (and got) the head of John the Baptist, who was in one of Herod's prisons (Mark 6:17–28). This story so gripped medieval imagination that the name Salome became more or less taboo until the end of the 19th century, when Oscar Wilde wrote a play about her and some unconventional souls began to choose the name for their daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Salome von Are-Hochstaden was born in 1155, in Wickrath, Kamp-Lintfort, Wesel, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, her father, Otto von Are, was 34 and her mother, Adelheid Von Hochstaden, was 29. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Graf Moritz I von Oldenburg. She died in 1211, in Oldenburg, at the age of 56.

ko.lifeSummary: Salome von Are-Hochstaden(이)가 1155년 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 크레이스 웨셀 카p-린트포트 윅래스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto von Are(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid Von Hochstaden(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Graf Moritz I von Oldenburg(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1211년 덴버그에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Salome von Are-Hochstaden родилась в 1155 г. в местности виккрат, камп-линтфорт, крис весел, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, её отцу по имени Otto von Are было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Adelheid Von Hochstaden, 29. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Graf Moritz I von Oldenburg. Она умерла в 1211 г. в местности олденбург в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Salome von Are-Hochstaden nació en 1155, en Wickrath, Kamp-Lintfort, Kreis Wesel, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Otto von Are, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Adelheid Von Hochstaden, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Graf Moritz I von Oldenburg. Murió en 1211, en Oldenburg, a la edad de 56 años.
